summary.notes: 167 entries total: 142 feature compositions under v2/<feature>/ + 25 primitive entries under ui/v2/ (a few entries aggregate sub-folders like ui/v2/faq/, ui/v2/invites/, ui/v2/join/, ui/v2/shared-game-detail/, ui/v2/shared-games/). Visual diff deferred to Stage 3 per spec §3 method (Playwright + pixelmatch); Stage 1 uses static analysis on TODO-stub markers + matrix cross-reference.
